name: Hawaiian Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients in the order listed to the pan.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. Unless otherwise noted, all ingredients should be at room temperature.
4. This can be mixed on manual of the bread machine.
5. After second kneading, remove dough from the machine, divide into two equal portions, and place in small loaf pans. Cover and let rise to double, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
